eigencore Engineering Guardrails

This repository follows vision.md for goals, prd.json for product scope, and plan_v1.md for engineering method. When they appear to conflict:

  1. vision.md wins on goals.
  2. prd.json wins on scope.
  3. plan_v1.md wins on execution discipline.

Non-negotiables

  • Public solver paths must run native engine code or carry an honest planner label identifying the path as a reference/oracle fallback.
  • R solver prototypes are reference code only. Keep them named reference_*, keep them unexported, and do not present them as production algorithms.
  • Sparse inputs must not silently densify in solver paths.
  • Certificates must carry one shared scale definition across dense and operator paths; changes to certificate semantics require tests that compare both paths.
  • Every exported symbol is a compatibility commitment. Do not export a helper unless it has real public semantics and supporting tests.
  • Any solver PR must update planner labels, certificate provenance, and the adversarial/reference test bank.

Coordination: mote

This project uses mote as the local issue tracker and reservation system (not bd/beads). Treat .mote/ops/ as append-only source of truth and reservations as advisory locks that other agents are expected to respect.

Common loop:

mote doctor                                   # readiness
mote actor show                               # confirm identity (e.g. claude-fixer, codex)
mote ready                                    # actionable issues
mote show <bd-id>                             # inspect an issue
mote preflight --issue <bd-id> --paths <p>    # check path conflicts
mote begin <bd-id> --paths <p> --note "..."   # reserve and start
mote note <bd-id> --kind progress|decision|blocker "..."
mote done <bd-id> --note "..."                # finish
mote handoff <bd-id> --to <actor> --release   # hand off
mote release <bd-id>                          # drop leases on stop

Keep reservations narrow (specific files; directories only for broad changes). On exit 2 (reducer rejection) inspect mote who-has <path> and mote history <bd-id> --include-rejected instead of retrying. Never hand-edit .mote/ops/*.json.

Current Execution Order

Work through plan_v1.md milestones A-M. A-E are prerequisites to production native solvers:

  • A: layer split and public-surface contraction
  • B: frozen BlockOperator ABI plus dense/CSC/diagonal native operators
  • C: adversarial test bank
  • D: typed certificates and full target taxonomy
  • E: dense-fallback memory policy

Do not add new solver families before these are in place.
